arts.ttl: Atalanta eye Lyon’s Cherki and Everton’s Calvert-Lewin to boost attack
arts.sum: Atalanta are actively exploring options to strengthen their attacking lineup, with Lyon's Rayan Cherki and Everton's Dominic Calvert-Lewin emerging as prime targets. The Serie A club's interest in these players comes as they look to enhance their attacking prowess in the January transfer window. arts.ttl: Everton exploring permanent move for Aston Villa star after he rejected them last summer - as Sean Dyche looks to fix his side's creativity issues
arts.sum: The 22-year-old has made 15 appearances across all competitions for Villa this season, but has largely been used off the bench by Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Everton and Leicester in battle to land 25-year-old Polish international
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion are set to allow Jakub Moder to leave the club in the January window, with Everton and Leicester City interested in landing him.
